expected_bug.summary: Non-atomic multi-file write: replace_once() writes each file immediately; if a later file lacks a version field, sys.exit() leaves the earlier files already bumped, so the repo is left in a half-updated, version-inconsistent state. A drift-prevention tool that creates drift on failure.

fixed_change: Two-phase: compute + validate all patches before writing any file (compute_patch writes nothing; main writes the batch only after all match).
